creator: jkh@FreeBSD.org
text:
State Changed
From-To: open->closed

1. boot.help isn't copied to the harddisk. 

Fixed. 

2. /usr/X11R6/* has directories with group write permission. 

I just extract 'em like they (XFree86, Inc) package 'em. ;-) 

3. XF86Setup fails to create the symbolic link X -> XF86_Mach64 
and aborts. 

Both this and #2 are actually bugs to report to the XFree86 team. 
I don't control these variables.
